name: IRC_GEO_NODE_ACTIVE_LATEST_V
query: SELECT GHN.GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID AS GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID, GHN.GEOGRAPHY_ID as GEOGRAPHY_ID, GHN.HIERARCHY_ID, GHN.PARENT_GEO_NODE_ID FROM IRC_GEO_HIER_NODES GHN WHERE GHN.GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID IN (SELECT GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID FROM IRC_GEO_HIER_HIRING_V) UNION ALL SELECT GHN.GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID AS GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID, GHN.GEOGRAPHY_ID as GEOGRAPHY_ID, GHN.HIERARCHY_ID, GHN.PARENT_GEO_NODE_ID FROM IRC_GEO_HIER_NODES GHN WHERE GHN.HIERARCHY_ID = (SELECT MAX(GHN1.HIERARCHY_ID) FROM IRC_GEO_HIER_NODES GHN1 WHERE GHN1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = GHN.GEOGRAPHY_ID) AND GHN.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN (SELECT GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM IRC_GEO_HIER_HIRING_V)
